calendar.matters:
PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PETITIONER
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Crystal Davieau; McCarthy & Holthus LLP; 619-243-3929; appearing as counsel for Petitioner Quality Loan Service Corp.
Janelle Lauren; CDLG, PC; 888-615-6765; appearing as counsel for claimant Sedrick Vanisi.

Petitioner contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PETITIONER is DENIED without prejudice for Petition to bring the petition again after good faith attempts to provide notice of surplus funds to the Gazaway or Vanisi or their successors in interest.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 924j And To Discharge Petitioner. Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all real property/foreclosure-related cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
